fields.name: USBHD_UC_DMA_EN
fields.description: DMA enable and DMA interrupt enable for USB

fields.name: USBHD_UC_CLR_ALL
fields.description: force clear FIFO and count of USB

fields.name: USBHD_UC_RESET_SIE
fields.description: force reset USB SIE, need software clear

fields.name: USBHD_UC_INT_BUSY
fields.description: enable automatic responding busy for device mode or automatic pause for host mode during interrupt flag UIF_TRANSFER valid

fields.name: USBHD_UC_SYS_CTRL_MASK
fields.description: USB device enable and internal pullup resistance enable

fields.name: USBHD_UC_LOW_SPEED
fields.description: enable USB low speed: 0=12Mbps, 1=1.5Mbps

fields.name: RB_UC_HOST_MODE
fields.description: enable USB host mode: 0=device mode, 1=host mode

fields.name: USBHD_UH_PORT_EN__USBHD_UD_PORT_EN
fields.description: enable USB port: 0=disable, 1=enable port, automatic disabled if USB device detached

fields.name: USBHD_UH_BUS_RESET__USBHD_UD_GP_BIT
fields.description: force clear FIFO and count of USB

fields.name: USBHD_UH_LOW_SPEED__USBHD_UD_LOW_SPEED
fields.description: enable USB port low speed: 0=full speed, 1=low speed

fields.name: USBHD_UH_DM_PIN__USBHD_UD_DM_PIN
fields.description: ReadOnly: indicate current UDM pin level

fields.name: USBHD_UH_DP_PIN__USBHD_UD_DP_PIN
fields.description: USB device enable and internal pullup resistance enable

fields.name: USBHD_UH_PD_DIS__USBHD_UD_PD_DIS
fields.description: disable USB UDP/UDM pulldown resistance: 0=enable pulldown, 1=disable

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_BUS_RST__USBHD_UIE_DETECT
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB bus reset event for USB device mode

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_TRANSFER
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB transfer completion

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_SUSPEND
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB suspend or resume event

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_HST_SOF
fields.description: enable interrupt for host SOF timer action for USB host mode

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_FIFO_OV
fields.description: enable interrupt for FIFO overflow

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_DEV_NAK
fields.description: enable interrupt for NAK responded for USB device mode

fields.name: USBHD_UIE_DEV_SOF
fields.description: enable interrupt for SOF received for USB device mode

fields.name: MASK_USB_ADDR
fields.description: bit mask for USB device address

fields.name: RB_UDA_GP_BIT
fields.description: general purpose bit

fields.name: RB_UMS_DEV_ATTACH
fields.description: RO, indicate device attached status on USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_DM_LEVEL
fields.description: RO, indicate UDM level saved at device attached to USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_SUSPEND
fields.description: RO, indicate USB suspend status

fields.name: RB_UMS_BUS_RESET
fields.description: RO, indicate USB bus reset status

fields.name: RB_UMS_R_FIFO_RDY
fields.description: RO, indicate USB receiving FIFO ready status (not empty)

fields.name: RB_UMS_SIE_FREE
fields.description: RO, indicate USB SIE free status

fields.name: RB_UMS_SOF_ACT
fields.description: RO, indicate host SOF timer action status for USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_SOF_PRES
fields.description: RO, indicate host SOF timer presage status

fields.name: RB_UIF_BUS_RST__RB_UIF_DETECT
fields.description: bus reset event interrupt flag for USB device mode, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear;device detected event interrupt flag for USB host mode, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_TRANSFER
fields.description: USB transfer completion interrupt flag, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_SUSPEND
fields.description: USB suspend or resume event interrupt flag, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_HST_SOF
fields.description: host SOF timer interrupt flag for USB host, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_FIFO_OV
fields.description: FIFO overflow interrupt flag for USB, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_U_SIE_FREE
fields.description: RO, indicate USB SIE free status

fields.name: RB_U_TOG_OK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer toggle is OK

fields.name: RB_U_IS_NAK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer is NAK received

fields.name: MASK_UIS_H_RES__MASK_UIS_ENDP
fields.description: RO, bit mask of current transfer handshake response for USB host mode: 0000=no response, time out from device, others=handshake response PID received;RO, bit mask of current transfer endpoint number for USB device mode

fields.name: MASK_UIS_TOKEN
fields.description: RO, bit mask of current token PID code received for USB device mode

fields.name: RB_UIS_TOG_OK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer toggle is OK

fields.name: RB_UIS_IS_NAK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer is NAK received for USB device mode

fields.name: RB_UEP4_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 4 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP4_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 4 receiving (OUT)

fields.name: RB_UEP1_BUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 1

fields.name: RB_UEP1_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 1 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP1_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 1 receiving (OUT)

fields.name: RB_UEP2_BUF_MOD__RB_UH_EP_RBUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 2;buffer mode of USB host IN endpoint

fields.name: RB_UEP2_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 2 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP2_RX_EN__RB_UH_EP_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 2 receiving (OUT);enable USB host IN endpoint receiving

fields.name: RB_UEP3_BUF_MOD__RB_UH_EP_TBUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 3;buffer mode of USB host OUT endpoint

fields.name: RB_UEP3_TX_EN__RB_UH_EP_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 3 transmittal (IN);enable USB host OUT endpoint transmittal

fields.name: RB_UEP3_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 3 receiving (OUT)

fields.name: RB_UEP5_BUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 5

fields.name: RB_UEP5_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 5 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP5_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 5 receiving (OUT)

fields.name: RB_UEP6_BUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 6

fields.name: RB_UEP6_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 6 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP3_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 6 receiving (OUT)

fields.name: RB_UEP7_BUF_MOD
fields.description: buffer mode of USB endpoint 7

fields.name: RB_UEP7_TX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 7 transmittal (IN)

fields.name: RB_UEP7_RX_EN
fields.description: enable USB endpoint 7 receiving (OUT)

registers.name: R32_UEP2_DMA__R32_UH_RX_DMA
registers.description: endpoint 2 DMA buffer address;host rx endpoint buffer high address

registers.name: R32_UEP3_DMA__R32_UH_TX_DMA
registers.description: endpoint 3 DMA buffer address;host tx endpoint buffer high address

fields.name: MASK_UEP_T_RES
fields.description: bit mask of handshake response type for USB endpoint X transmittal (IN)

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_T_TOG
fields.description: prepared data toggle flag of USB endpoint X transmittal (IN): 0=DATA0, 1=DATA1

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_AUTO_TOG
fields.description: enable automatic toggle after successful transfer completion on endpoint 1/2/3: 0=manual toggle, 1=automatic toggle

fields.name: MASK_UEP_R_RES
fields.description: bit mask of handshake response type for USB endpoint X receiving (OUT)

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_R_TOG
fields.description: expected data toggle flag of USB endpoint X receiving (OUT): 0=DATA0, 1=DATA1

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_AUTO_TOG
fields.description: enable automatic toggle after successful transfer completion on endpoint 1/2/3: 0=manual toggle, 1=automatic toggle

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_T_TOG_
fields.description: prepared data toggle flag of USB endpoint X transmittal (IN): 0=DATA0, 1=DATA1

fields.name: USBHD_UEP_AUTO_TOG
fields.description: enable automatic toggle after successful transfer completion on endpoint 1/2/3: 0=manual toggle, 1=automatic toggle

fields.name: USBHD_UH_SOF_EN
fields.description: USB host automatic SOF enable

fields.name: USBHD_UH_PRE_PID_EN
fields.description: USB host PRE PID enable for low speed device via hub
